programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble helps a black boxer realize that he may have a brain injury that will kill him if he continues to box Meanwhile an undercover police Sgt closes in on Kimble

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike travels deep into the jungle areas of a small Latin-American country in search of a sacred pool of water and its secrets held within

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike attempts a risky rescue of a young girl trapped inside an underwater mine

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A pilot major assigned elsewhere when his crew was killed in combat suffers a guilt complex and becomes reckless with his missions and the lives of his subordinates

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah tells David that Dr Woodard has died so Carolyn tries to console him by telling of her childhood friend As Burke prepares to leave for a business trip everyones perplexed when David says his final goodbyes

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas tells Julia the tale of Josette When news of Burkes plane crash reaches Collinwood Victoria insists he will return alive

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas is angered when Julia jealously snaps at Victoria

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas feels so well from the treatments that he decides to ask Victoria to sit and watch the sunrise with him so Julia hypnotizes her and shows Vicki where Barnabas slumbers

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Following an Elvis sighting to The Springwood Hotel a tabloid reporter finds that the phony stories that he writes come true Meanwhile an amnesiac has a terrifying dream that he committed murder before losing his memory

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An alcoholic reporter is inspired by a beautiful woman to find a good murder case no matter what

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Janet is married to a doctor whos married to his work She wants to live her life with passion danger and romance like Fuchsia Monroe a soap opera character she watches religiously When her television goes haywire her friend Louise convinces her to get cable With her husband unresponsive to her needs she begins a steamy affair with the cable guy

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Knight 307
programme.desc: Knight 307

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A vengeful quadriplegic discovers that she can regain control of her body with the help of a magic wheelchair

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer accompanies his friend Frankie to his home for the weekend While there Gomer sings a love song to Frankies sister who is engaged to a local fellow who is not in a rush to get married Frankie and his mother use this as an opportunity to move the fellow to the altar

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Pyle wants Sgt Carter to meet his cousin Bridey at the Camp Dance Carter declines until he and Cpl Boyle spot Pyle out with a very attractive girl They assume erroneously that the girl is Pyles cousin After that is explained there is another case of mistaken identity that keep Carter and Boyle busy

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Fastidious actor Sterling Ames injures his back on the McCoys property and must remain on their sofa for several days much to the annoyance of cantankerous Grandpa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Fastidious actor Sterling Ames injures his back on the McCoys property and must remain on their sofa for several days much to the annoyance of cantankerous Grandpa

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max gets a hip black partner as he and 99 tour the world as a ping-pong pro in this spoof of I Spy

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL tries to get some KAOS files with the help of a non-professional spy

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Tinker is arrested for the theft of Binghamtons printing press and The Captain taps Parker to be Tinkers Defense Counsel in a trial which Binghamton himself will preside over Parker and McHale must then stall the proceedings while Gruber and The Crew execute a plan to get Tinker off the hook with a bit of creative evidence-tampering

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy directive - Ordering all married Officers to be shipped home - Prompts Binghamton to scheme to get McHale married off to a shady saloon-keeper by the name of Kate OHara - An old friend of McHales But neither Kate nor McHale want to tie the knot so they join forces to try to thwart Binghamtons plan

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Hercules 212
programme.desc: Hercules 212

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An unknown woman saves Augur and Liam from the raids on the Resistance Lili sabotages the mother ship but Zoor stops its total destruction Lili is reportedly dead The investigation on the Presidents shooter continues

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter Delmer Plebus Powells Gwent a huge spacecraft which defies aerodynamics and is an extension of Gwents genius and ego

programme.title: Gamera War of the Monsters
programme.desc: Prehistoric monster Gamera returns to wreak havoc on Japan American version of the classic kaiju film Gamera vs Barugon

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The remains of an inmate at the Alcatraz Federal Prison was discovered between a wall during some repairs It was thought that the inmate Lou Kovic escaped 20 years earlier but Mike and Steve believe he was murdered

programme.title: Mission Imposssible
programme.desc: In a rare episode of the series in which the IM Force isnt sent on a government-sanctioned mission theyre forced by a criminal named Egan whos kidnapped the daughter of a friend of Briggs to capture a heavily guarded witness in a trial against him They know Egan plans to kill the witness but Briggs is put in a tight spot and is determined that Egan wont get a chance to kill the witness

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: On an April 4 1968 Martin Luther King was assassinated in Memphis Tennesee With riots erupting all over the United States the Los Angeles Police Department braces for worse case scenarios such as rioting and bomb threats Friday and Gannon are assigned to the command post and monitor the situation from there and wait for the first sign of trouble However as the weekend progresses Friday notes that Los Angeles is quieter than normal and that many of the people are doing their best to remember that Dr King stood for peace

programme.desc: Kimbles current boss A warehouse owner with a terminal disease wants to help Dr Kimble by impersonating him leading Lt Gerald to the Country of Greece and dying at sea

programme.desc: While travelling cross country Victoria and Heath have an accident resulting in Heath becoming pinned under their heavily loaded wagon Victoria seeks help and turns to a mysterious man who is being pursued by aggressive bounty hunters

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.desc: Episode 2–Mob Candy

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Miniaturized to repair a computer the Guardians must defend themselves against aggressive cleaner drones as well as a miniaturized Renegade sabotage team

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians discover a lost race of Gobots in an underground city

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League visits a planet which harbours the greatest computer ever built hoping its terminals hold information on Audrics whereabouts The computer Logos keeps switching Audric back and forth between helping and fighting Jayce

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.desc: Mask 165

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Maori Chief Kaitaia has a map to Glow Worm Grotto tattooed on his back VENOM needs this information to find the grotto and steal the pearl treasure inside

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it
